nasb.text: Now the rest of the acts of Amaziah, from first to last, behold, are they not written in the Book of the Kings of Judah and Israel?

esv.text: Now the rest of the deeds of Amaziah, from first to last, are they not written in the Book of the Kings of Judah and Israel?

cnv.text: 亞瑪謝其餘的事蹟，一生的始末，不是都記在猶大和以色列諸王記上嗎？

ccb.text: 亚玛谢其他的事自始至终都记在犹大与以色列的列王史上。
